pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-024 (AI and Machine Learning/Knowledge) excluded as edge_case (composite 0.417, highest: EU AI Act at 0.417). Domain prior: edge. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with edge_case classification, composite 0.417, and AI and Machine Learning (AI) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.417)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Marketplace Manager job postings does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
